title: Purge all use of easyjson and ffjson in libpod
body: We're no longer using either of these JSON libraries, dropped them in favor of jsoniter. We can't completely remove ffjson as c/storage uses it and can't easily migrate, but we can make sure that libpod itself isn't doing anything with them anymore.
